data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Apple.com uses a microservices architecture to efficiently manage different application functions.
data.technical_spec: Services are decoupled, allowing independent scaling and deployment.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Implements load balancing to distribute traffic evenly across servers.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes algorithms like Round Robin and Least Connections.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: CDN is used to reduce latency by serving content from geographically distributed servers.
data.technical_spec: Partnership with major CDN providers like Akamai.

data.title: Redundancy and Failover
data.description: Designed with redundancy strategies to ensure high availability.
data.technical_spec: Uses failover clusters and backup systems.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized API gateway to manage service requests and responses.
data.technical_spec: Handles cross-cutting concerns such as security and routing.
